name: nexxtech
description: Root package for running frontend and backend simultaneously

scripts.start: npx -y concurrently "npm --prefix frontend start" "npm --prefix backend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('frontend/build')) { if(fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.rmSync('dist', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.renameSync('frontend/build', 'dist'); }"
